title: Pan-Seared Dumplings with Sherry Sauce
description: A classic Chinese-inspired dish featuring pan-seared dumplings served in a rich sherry sauce.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the sherry and dry white wine (if using) and stir-fry until the liquid has almost completely reduced.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the dumplings and cook until they are golden brown on the bottom.
Add the sesame oil and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the dumplings hot with the sherry sauce spooned over the top.
